quality.completeness: High. All standard spell fields are present and populated.
quality.readability: High. Description is clear and well-formatted.
quality.mechanical_clarity: High. The triggering conditions (Tiny or larger creature touching/entering) and the two distinct output types (mental ping/audible bell) are clearly defined.

mechanics.level_school_match: Appropriate. Level 1 Abjuration fits protection/warding spells.
mechanics.ritual_utility: High. Being a ritual greatly enhances its utility for long-term security.
mechanics.casting_time_duration_ratio: Appropriate. 1 minute setup for an 8-hour duration is balanced.
mechanics.component_detail: Material component is specific (tiny bell and fine silver wire), which is good.
mechanics.range_interaction: The casting range (30ft) is separate from the mental alarm range (1 mile), which is mechanically sound.
mechanics.effect_tiers: The spell offers two distinct mechanical options (mental vs. audible), providing tactical flexibility.

suggestions: None needed. The spell is well-defined and mechanically solid as a low-level utility/security spell.
